{"type":"result","subtype":"success","is_error":false,"api_error_status":null,"duration_ms":316674,"duration_api_ms":232156,"num_turns":38,"result":"Phase 1 완료. 커밋 `9f6378c` 생성 (6 files, +117/-4).

**변경 요약:**

1. **DTO 확장** — `CreateDrawingRevisionDto`와 `IntegrationCreateDrawingRevisionDto`에 `revision_request` reason 추가. `actorType`/`actorName` optional 필드 추가 (기본값 `'admin'`)
2. **`getLatestForStage()`** — 공정 단계별 조회 규칙 구현 (drawing→initial/domuson_fit, sample→sample_revision, drawing_confirmed→processStage 기반, laser~creasing→field_correction/laser_processing, delivery→최신)
3. **`getLatestForCurrentStage()`** — Contact의 현재 processStage 기반 자동 선택 + PROCESS_STAGE_ORDER 역순 fallback
4. **`GET /contacts/:id/latest-drawing`** — 새 엔드포인트, `:id/drawing-revisions` 바로 앞에 배치
5. **`ContactsService.findOne()`** — `latestDrawing` 필드 포함하여 반환","stop_reason":"end_turn","session_id":"4c657500-6565-4d2d-a8f0-def1c5b7c520","total_cost_usd":1.5570282500000001,"usage":{"input_tokens":159,"cache_creation_input_tokens":107221,"cache_read_input_tokens":1092154,"output_tokens":13601,"server_tool_use":{"web_search_requests":0,"web_fetch_requests":0},"service_tier":"standard","cache_creation":{"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":107221,"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0},"inference_geo":"","iterations":[{"input_tokens":10,"output_tokens":424,"cache_read_input_tokens":87962,"cache_creation_input_tokens":1709,"cache_creation":{"ephemeral_5m_input_tokens":0,"ephemeral_1h_input_tokens":1709},"type":"message"}],"speed":"standard"},"modelUsage":{"claude-opus-4-6[1m]":{"inputTokens":159,"outputTokens":13601,"cacheReadInputTokens":1092154,"cacheCreationInputTokens":107221,"webSearchRequests":0,"costUSD":1.5570282500000001,"contextWindow":1000000,"maxOutputTokens":64000}},"permission_denials":[],"terminal_reason":"completed","fast_mode_state":"off","uuid":"660649f1-008f-4b95-b3d8-14b594e22482"}
